candidate_acceptance.required_rule: all rejected expansion candidates require human review

future_vertical_slice_acceptance.expected_evidence: FINAL_DRD.md plus final manifest, hash index, reference index, and compiler conservation report
clickable inventory and interaction graph contain every clickable element from the PRD fixture
recoverable failure state, retry path, edit path, and user-facing failure copy
desktop, tablet, mobile iOS, and mobile Material layout records
conservation report shows no unapproved semantic additions

candidate_validation_commands: python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; root=Path('build_program/phases/P2/candidates/P2-SPEC-01'); coverage=json.loads((root/'P2_SCOPE_COVERAGE_MATRIX.json').read_text()); inventory=json.loads((root/'P2_PRD_ELEMENT_INVENTORY.json').read_text()); edges=json.loads((root/'P2_INTERACTION_EDGE_TABLE.json').read_text()); phase=json.loads((root/'P2_PHASE_TRANSITION_EVIDENCE.json').read_text()); artifacts=json.loads((root/'P2_ARTIFACT_INVENTORY.json').read_text()); layout=json.loads((root/'P2_LAYOUT_VALIDATION_PARAMETERS.json').read_text()); assert len(coverage['coverage_rows'])==10; assert all(r['status']=='PASS' for r in coverage['coverage_rows']); clickable={e['element_id'] for e in inventory['elements'] if e['category']=='clickable'}; triggers={e['trigger_element'] for e in edges['edges']}; assert clickable <= triggers; assert phase['effective_state_for_this_candidate']['status']=='P2_SPEC_ACTIVE_BY_COMMITTED_P1_BUILD_GATE'; assert len(artifacts['stages'])==7; assert len(layout['carriers'])==4; print('PASS')"

PYTHONPATH=repository/src python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; from drd_harness.validators.phase_gate import canonical_lock_root, validate_build_lock_readiness; lock=json.loads(Path('control/locks/P1_BUILD_LOCK.json').read_text()); assert lock['root_sha256']==canonical_lock_root(lock); assert not validate_build_lock_readiness(lock); print('PASS')"
